variants: Coline Dutilleul currently resides in Glacierwill Commons, though her journey began in Vermilion Green. An alumnus of the Mirthwood Institute, she gained valuable knowledge in hospitality management. Coline has dedicated her professional life to Zinnia Peak Hotels, where she strives to enhance every guest's experience. Her dedication and exceptional service in the hospitality industry earned her the prestigious Bronze Canopy Medal, a testament to her hard work and commitment.
